meta.title: TrueFootage Inspect — on-site UAD 3.6 field model
meta.description: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the on-site inspection app information architecture: page → section → field, with conditionality, gating graph, and existence-indicator spawn classification. The interactive workbench (inspection-gating-playground.html) is GENERATED from this file via build-workbench.py — edit this JSON (or the template), then rebuild.
meta.scope: Subject-property, on-site UAD 3.6 fields only. Excludes desktop-only (comparables/sales/valuation), ~110 auto-captured IMAGE metadata fields, and project-financial/rental/HBU/analysis containers.

conventions.conditionality: R=always required, CR=conditionally required, O=optional, NA=not applicable for this property type.
conventions.gate: CR fields carry a parsed gate = OR-of-ANDs: {groups:[[{f:fieldName,op:eq|ne|has|nothas,v:value}]]}. Visible/required when ANY group has ALL predicates satisfied.
conventions.spawns: Existence-indicator booleans (*ExistsIndicator / *DefectsExist*): kind="children" => toggling true adds a 0:N collection of the named entity; kind="child" => a single 0:1 child.
conventions.fieldOrder: Arrays preserve intended display order (gate/discriminator fields first within a section).

meta.provenance: Bootstrapped from UAD 3.6 Appendix A-1 + UPD spec via the uad-3-6-expert skill. Indicators verified 100% Boolean. Filter note: do NOT exclude desk fields by "Sales Comparison" in report_location (subject fields echo into the comparable grid).

fields.name: AddressLineText
fields.definition: The address with the address number, pre-directional, street name, post-directional, address unit designators and address unit value.
fields.reportLocation:
1.000: Summary - {No Subsection} - {No Label}
3.000: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Physical Address
22.01.01: Sales Comparison Approach - General Information - Property Address
23.02.01: Rental Information - Comparable Rental Properties - Subject Property
24.000: Income Approach - Gross Rent Multiplier Comparables - Property Address

updMapping.notes: UPD streetAddress = UAD 3.6 AddressLineText

complianceRules.msg: Provide the address line for the subject property physical address.
complianceRules.logic: If AddressLineText is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide the address line for the sales comparable.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and AddressLineText is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide the address line for the Client company address.
complianceRules.logic: If AddressLineText is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

fields.definition: The postal code (ZIP Code in the US) for the address. ZIP Code may be either 5 or 9 digits.
fields.implementationNote: Deliver as 5-digit ZIP Code or ZIP+4 Code (with the dash).

3.000: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Physical Address
22.01.01: Sales Comparison Approach - General Information - Property Address
23.02.01: Rental Information - Comparable Rental Properties - Subject Property
24.000: Income Approach - Gross Rent Multiplier Comparables - Property Address

updMapping.notes: UPD postalCode = UAD 3.6 PostalCode

complianceRules.msg: Provide the ZIP code for the subject property physical address.
complianceRules.logic: If PostalCode is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The ZIP code for the subject property physical address must be either 5 digits, or 5 digits, a hyphen, and 4 digits (ZIP+4).
complianceRules.logic: If PostalCode is not in the required format (5 digits, or 5 digits, a hyphen, and 4 digits)

updMapping.notes: UPD state = UAD 3.6 StateCode

complianceRules.msg: Provide the state code for the subject property physical address.
complianceRules.logic: If StateCode is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The state code for the subject property physical address must be a valid 2-character US State or Territory Code.
complianceRules.logic: If StateCode is not a valid 2-character US State or Territory Code

complianceRules.msg: Provide the state code for the sales comparable.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and StateCode is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The Appraiser and Supervisory Appraiser must be licensed in the state in which the subject property is located.

complianceRules.logic: If StateCode is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

fields.name: AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount
fields.definition: The total number of accessory dwelling units in the subject property. Possible examples may include in-law quarters, apartment over a garage, etc.
fields.implementationNote: Deliver as zero if there are no accessory dwelling units on the property.
fields.reportLocation:
3.006: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Accessory Dwelling Units
24.002: Income Approach - Gross Rent Multiplier Comparables - Accessory Dwelling Units

complianceRules.msg: Provide the total number of ADUs, even if the value is 0.
complianceRules.logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The number of 'Accessory Dwelling Units' does not equal the number of living units identified as an ADU.
complianceRules.logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount <> the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the total number of ADUs in the sales comparable.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the living unit utilities are metered separately.
complianceRules.logic: If (LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1 or AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount > 0), and UtilitiesMeteredSeparatelyIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: Unit Identifier must be provided when multiple living units are identified in the appraisal.
complianceRules.logic: If (LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1 or AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount > 0), and UnitIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: When the sales comparable and the subject property have more than one living unit, each comparable unit must be associated to a subject property unit. In the UAD XML, a RELATIONSHIP container must be included that links the instance of PROPERTY_UNIT (@ValuationUseType = 'SalesComparable') to PROPERTY_UNIT (@ValuationUseType = 'SubjectProperty'). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
complianceRules.logic:
If (@ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and (LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1 or AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount > 0)) and
(@ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and (LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1 or AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount > 0)), and there is not an instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/PROPERTY_UNIT_IsComparableFor_PROPERTY_UNIT

fields.name: AttachmentType

enums.definition: Residential dwelling that has a common wall or other direct physical connection with another residential dwelling.
Residential dwelling that has no common wall or other direct physical connection with another residential dwelling.

fields.definition: A value from a MISMO prescribed list that specifies the type of physical attachment, if any, between the dwelling and adjacent dwellings.
fields.reportLocation:
1.013: Summary - Property Description - Attachment Type
3.004: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Attachment Type
22.01.08: Sales Comparison Approach - General Information - Attached/Detached

updMapping.notes:
UPD buildingDesign "Detached" = UAD 3.6 AttachmentType "Detached"

UPD buildingDesign "HIGH_RISE" = StructuralDesignType "Highrise"

UPD buildingDesign "LOW_RISE" = StructuralDesignType "Lowrise"

UPD buildingDesign "GARDEN" = StructuralDesignType "Lowrise"

UPD buildingDesign "MID_RISE" = StructuralDesignType "Midrise"

UPD buildingDesign "ROWHOUSE_TOWNHOUSE" = StructuralDesignType "RowhouseTownh

UPD attachmentType "ATTACHED" = UAD 3.6 AttachmentType "Attached"

UPD attachmentType "DETACHED" = UAD 3.6 AttachmentType "Detached"

UPD attachmentType "LEFT_SEMIDETATCHED" or "RIGHT_SEMIDETATCHED" = UAD 3.6 AttachmentType "Attached" and StructuralDesignType "SemiDetached"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the 'Attachment Type' for the property.
complianceRules.logic: If AttachmentType is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Structure Design' (e.g., Low-rise, Mid-rise, High-rise, Rowhouse / Townhouse, Semi-Detached) for each dwelling.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached", and StructuralDesignType is not provided in ARCHITECTURAL_DESIGN in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Construction Method' (e.g., Site Built, Manufactured, Modular) for each dwelling.
complianceRules.logic: If ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Detached") or (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType = "RowhouseTownhouse" or "SemiDetached" or "Other")), and (at least one instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD is not provided or ConstructionMethodType is not provided in a given instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD)

complianceRules.msg: Provide the 'Floor Number'.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType = ("Lowrise" or "Highrise" or "Midrise"), and FloorIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Structural Design'.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType is not provided in a given instance of ARCHITECTURAL_DESIGN

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the sales comparable is attached or detached.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and AttachmentType is not provided

fields.name: CommunityLandTrustIndicator
fields.definition: Indicates that the property is located in a community land trust.
fields.reportLocation: 3.020: Subject Property - Ownership Rights - Community Land Trust

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the subject property is located in a community land trust.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" or "Other", and CommunityLandTrustIndicator is not provided

fields.name: DwellingCount
fields.definition: The total number of structures on the property, excluding outbuildings, that contains a living unit.
fields.implementationNote: Represents the count of structures with the ImprovementType = "Dwelling"
fields.reportLocation: 3.007: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Dwellings Containing Units

complianceRules.msg: Provide the total number of dwellings.
complianceRules.logic: If DwellingCount is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The total number of dwellings must be at least 1.
complianceRules.logic: If DwellingCount < 1

complianceRules.msg: The total number of dwellings exceeds the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.
complianceRules.logic: If DwellingCount > LivingUnitExcludingADUCount

complianceRules.msg: The 'Dwellings Containing Units' does not equal the number of structures identified as a dwelling.
complianceRules.logic: If DwellingCount does not equal the number of instances of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the total number of dwellings.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and DwellingCount is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The total number of dwellings must be at least 1.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and DwellingCount < 1

fields.name: HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator
fields.definition: When true, indicates that the homeowner is responsible for maintaining the exterior of the subject property.
fields.reportLocation: 3.016: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Homeowner Responsible for all Exterior Maintenance of Dwelling(s)

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Homeowner Responsible for all Exterior Maintenance of Dwelling(s)'.
complianceRules.logic: If HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The exterior feature type must be included. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: Provide the foundation details (e.g., style, material) for the structure.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL with ImprovementComponentType = "Foundation"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the materials used for the foundation.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType = "Foundation" and (at least one instance of FOUNDATION_MATERIAL is not provided or FoundationMaterialType is not provided in a given instance of FOUNDATION_MATERIAL)

complianceRules.msg: Provide the type of foundation.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType = "Foundation" and (at least one instance of FOUNDATION_STYLE is not provided or FoundationType is not provided in a given instance of FOUNDATION_STYLE)

complianceRules.msg: Provide the roof details (e.g., estimated age, material) for the structure.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL with ImprovementComponentType = "Roof"

fields.name: LivingUnitExcludingADUCount
fields.definition: The number of separate living units in the subject property, excluding any accessory dwelling units.
fields.reportLocation:
1.021: Summary - Property Description - Units Excluding ADUs
3.005: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Units Excluding ADUs
24.001: Income Approach - Gross Rent Multiplier Comparables - Units Excluding ADUs

complianceRules.msg: The total number of dwellings exceeds the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.
complianceRules.logic: If DwellingCount > LivingUnitExcludingADUCount

complianceRules.msg: Provide the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.
complianceRules.logic: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount is not provided

complianceRules.msg: The total number of living units, excluding any ADUs, must be at least 1.
complianceRules.logic: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount < 1

complianceRules.msg: The 'Units Excluding ADUs' does not equal the number of living units delivered in the UAD XML.
complianceRules.logic: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount does not equal the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "false"

complianceRules.msg: When 'Units Excluding ADUs' is more than 1, the structure identifier must be provided for each dwelling.
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1, and StructureIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the dwelling has any non-continuous finished area (e.g., a finished office above, below, or behind an attached garage that cannot be accessed from within any living unit).
complianceRules.logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and LivingUnitExcludingADUCount = 1, and NonContinuousFinishedAreaIndicator is not provided in in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

fields.name: PropertyEstateType

enums.definition: The greatest possible interest a person can have in real estate, including the right to dispose of the property or pass it on to their heirs.
An estate or interest in real property held by virtue of a lease.

fields.definition: A value from a MISMO prescribed list that specifies the ownership interest in the property.
fields.reportLocation:
1.023: Summary - Property Description - Property Rights Appraised
3.019: Subject Property - Ownership Rights - Property Rights Appraised
22.01.09: Sales Comparison Approach - General Information - Property Rights Appraised

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Property Rights Appraised'.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and PropertyEstateType is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide a description when 'Property Rights Appraised' = 'Other'.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Other" and PropertyEstateTypeOtherDescription is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Ground Rent Annual Amount'.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseAnnualAmount is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide the property ground lease expiration date.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseExpirationDate is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the property ground lease is renewable.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseRenewableIndicator is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the subject property is located in a community land trust.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" or "Other", and CommunityLandTrustIndicator is not provided

fields.name: PropertyEstateTypeOtherDescription
fields.definition: A free-form text field used to collect additional information when Other is selected for Property Estate Type.
fields.reportLocation:
1.023: Summary - Property Description - Property Rights Appraised
3.019: Subject Property - Ownership Rights - Property Rights Appraised
22.01.09: Sales Comparison Approach - General Information - Property Rights Appraised

complianceRules.msg: Provide a description when 'Property Rights Appraised' = 'Other'.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Other" and PropertyEstateTypeOtherDescription is not provided

fields.name: PropertyInProjectIndicator
fields.definition: When true, indicates that the property is located in a project per trading partner guidelines.
fields.implementationNote: Cannot be delivered as "true" if PUDIndicator = "true".
fields.reportLocation:
1.016: Summary - {No Subsection} - Condominium
1.017: Summary - {No Subsection} - Cooperative
1.018: Summary - {No Subsection} - Condop
3.011: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Condominium
3.012: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Cooperative
3.013: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Condop
18.001: Project Information - {No Subsection} - Condominium
18.002: Project Information - {No Subsection} - Cooperative
18.003: Project Information - {No Subsection} - Condop

updMapping.notes: When UPD numberofElevators is > 0, set UAD 3.6 PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and set AmenityType to "Elevator"

complianceRules.msg: Provide 'Property Rights Appraised'.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and PropertyEstateType is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the property is located in a project.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide the 'APN Description'.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and (PARCEL_DETAIL is not provided or ParcelDescriptionClassificationType is not provided in a given instance of PARCEL)

complianceRules.msg: Provide ParcelIdentificationType = 'AssessorUnformattedIdentifier' for each parcel. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and at least one instance of PARCEL container with ParcelIdentificationType = "AssessorUnformattedIdentifier" is not provided or a given instance of PARCEL container does not include ParcelIdentificationType = "AssessorUnformattedIdentifier"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the ownership type of the property (e.g., cooperative, condominium, condop).
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the sales comparable is located in a project.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and PropertyInProjectIndicator is not provided

fields.name: PUDIndicator
fields.definition: When true, indicates that the property is located within a Planned Unit Development (PUD). A PUD is a project or subdivision that consists of common property and / or improvements that are owned and maintained by an owners’ association for the benefit and use of the individual unit owners.
fields.implementationNote: Cannot be delivered as "true" if PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true".
fields.reportLocation:
1.015: Summary - Property Description - Planned Unit Development (PUD)
3.010: Subject Property - {No Subsection} - Planned Unit Development (PUD)
18.000: Project Information - {No Subsection} - Planned Unit Development (PUD)

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the property is located within a PUD.
complianceRules.logic: If PUDIndicator is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the sales comparable is located in a planned unit development (PUD).
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and PUDIndicator is not provided

complianceRules.msg: Provide amenities in the project. Select 'None' if there are no amenities.
complianceRules.logic: If (PUDIndicator = "true" or PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true"), and (at least one instance of PROJECT_AMENITY is not provided or AmenityType is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_AMENITY)

complianceRules.msg: The AssociationChargeType must be provided as 'AssociationDues' for the mandatory association fees. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
complianceRules.logic: IF PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE with AssociationChargeType = "AssociationDues"

complianceRules.msg: The AssociationChargeType must be provided as 'AssociationSpecialAssessment' for the project special assessments. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE with AssociationChargeType = "AssociationSpecialAssessment"

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the research on the project revealed pending or current legal actions.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true") and LegalActionIndicator is not provided

fields.name: InspectionDate
fields.definition: The date the inspection of the property was performed.
fields.reportLocation: 2.023: Assignment Information - Contact Information - Inspection Date

complianceRules.msg: Provide the date the property inspection was performed.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator = "true" and InspectionDate is not provided in SERVICE container with ServiceType = "Inspection"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the date the Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser inspected the subject property.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" or "Virtual"), or (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" or "Virtual"), and InspectionDate is not provided in a given instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: The 'Inspection Date' must be on or before the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
complianceRules.logic: If InspectionDate > AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

complianceRules.msg: The 'Inspection Date' must include year, month and day.
complianceRules.logic: If InspectionDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format)

fields.name: PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType

enums.definition: No exterior inspection of the property was completed.
An in-person, exterior inspection of the property was completed.
An exterior inspection of the property was completed using an electronic device conducted via interactive or recorded (non-interactive) video.

fields.definition: A value from a MISMO prescribed list that represents the method by which the exterior inspection was conducted.
fields.reportLocation: 2.021: Assignment Information - Contact Information - Exterior

complianceRules.msg: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser", and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "InteriorAndExterior"

complianceRules.msg: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Virtual" or "NoInspection" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Virtual" or "NoInspection" for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"), and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "NoPhysicalInspection"

complianceRules.msg: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Virtual" or "NoInspection" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"), and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "Exterior"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the manner in which the Property Data Collector conducted the exterior inspection.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator = "true" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType is not provided in SERVICE container with ServiceType = "Inspection"

complianceRules.msg: Provide the date the Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser inspected the subject property.
complianceRules.logic: If (PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" or "Virtual"), or (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" or "Virtual"), and InspectionDate is not provided in a given instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: Provide the manner in which the exterior inspection was conducted by the Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser.
complianceRules.logic: If PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType is not provided in a given instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL

fields.name: PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType

enums.definition: No interior inspection of the property was completed.
An in-person, interior inspection of the property was completed.
An interior inspection of the property was completed using an electronic device conducted via interactive or recorded (non-interactive) video.

fields.definition: A value from a MISMO prescribed list that represents the method by which the interior inspection was conducted.
fields.reportLocation: 2.022: Assignment Information - Contact Information - Interior

complianceRules.msg: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.

fields.name: DisasterMitigationFeatureType

A structural system designed to resist wind and earthquake forces in which frames are secured and are designed to not sway laterally.

Permanently attached material used to protect windows or doors that can be stored when not in use (e.g. hurricane shutters).
System designed to secure the water heater in place in the event of an earthquake.

fields.name: WaterfrontFeatureType

enums.definition: A strip of land separating a body of water from inland areas, typically used for recreation or leisure purposes.
A machine for raising and lowering watercraft to and from the water.

A permanent structure leading out from shore into a body of water. Typically made of concrete, steel, or treated timbers that is supported on pillars or girders.
Rock or other material set in place to protect shorelines (e.g. shot rock, rock armor, or rubble).
A wall or structure designed to protect shorelines from wave loads and/or to retain soil and prevent erosion.

A structure designed to enhance the poolside experience.
A structure designed to store agricultural materials in bulk.
A structure designed to house livestock.
A detached accessory dwelling unit.

fields.definition: An identifier made up of 3 letters followed by 6 numbers (in some cases 7 numbers). It may be found on a (red) metal label affixed to the exterior of the manufactured home. It might read something like ULI 012345. As per HUD regulations, the label identifier consists of a 3 letter designation which identifies the production inspection primary inspection agency, and which the Sectary shall assign. Each label shall be marked with a 6 digit number which the label supplier shall furnish. The labels shall be stamped with numbers sequentially.
fields.implementationNote: Deliver for dwellings and outbuildings if the HUD certification number is known to the appraiser.

A system that boils water in a central unit and moves steam to a radiator in an individual room or space.
A fuel burning unit that provides radiant heat.

enums.definition: A nook or informal dining area extended from the kitchen.
An enclosed area which is designed to be primarily used as an office (e.g. office, library, study) and would not be typically considered as a bedroom.
A bathroom that contains a sink, toilet and any combination of bathtub or shower.
A bathroom that contains a sink and toilet, but no bathtub or shower.
An area designed and equipped to be used for the preparation and cooking of food.
A room containing plumbing for a washing machine and/or dryer which is specifically designed for the cleaning and care of clothing and linens.
A finished area that is open to the room or floor directly below.
An area designed to replicate the theater experience (e.g. home theater).
An area typically used as an entry way where footwear and outerwear can be removed and stored before entering the house.
A room or area designated to be used for recreation and entertainment.
A room that is built with large windows which are designed to allow in natural light (e.g. solarium).

A room that houses systems or equipment that are designed to utilize, relay, or enhance the systems of the house (e.g. water heater, electrical panels, forced air, heating mechanism, furnace, sump pum
A room used to support different hobbies or activities (e.g. tool room, craft room, dark room).

enums.definition: A room which has been completely modernized, renovated, refinished or remodeled to a like new condition.
A room which has had no modernization and has not experienced any renovation, refinishing, or remodeling since the original date of construction or within a timeframe that renders the update’s impact
A room which has a level of modernization with some replaced, refinished or refurbished components but does not rise to the level of total replacement.

fields.definition: A value from a MISMO prescribed list that represents the degree to which the room has been finished.

fields.name: AccessibilityFeatureType
fields.conditionalityText:
IF (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" ) 
OR 
(ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" AND OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" AND AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")

enums.definition: Voice actuated device or other audible signal installed to assist individuals with accessibility.
Safety devices designed to enable a person to maintain balance while standing. Typically found in bathrooms.
Safety devices designed to enable a person to maintain balance while walking. Typically found in stairways and hallways.
Individual components installed or modified to assist individuals with accessibility (e.g. window latches, locks, door knobs, cabinet pulls).

fields.definition: A value from a MISMO prescribed list that represents a feature that has been designed to provide accessibility and usability for a person with disabilities.
fields.implementationNote:
If 'None' is selected then no other enumerations should be delivered._x000D_

UPD aduIndicator "True" = UAD 3.6 AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator "true"

complianceRules.msg: The number of 'Accessory Dwelling Units' does not equal the number of living units identified as an ADU.

fields.name: UnitIdentifier
fields.definition: An unique alphanumeric string used to identify and/or differentiate between multiple units located on the property.

IF (ImprovementType = "Dwelling")

(ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" AND OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" AND AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")

enums.display: The items listed below represent the As Is condition as of the effective date of this report

fields.definition: When true, indicates that the interior of the living unit or the accessory dwelling unit has defect(s), damage(s) or deficienc(ies).
fields.implementationNote:
When UnitInteriorDefectsExistIndicator is "true", a RELATIONSHIP container must be delivered joining the DEFECT to that instance of PROPERTY_UNIT.

Display Note:
This data element does not display directly in the Reconciliation Section. If defects exist in any section of the output report, those defects are re-displayed in the Reconciliation Apparent Defects, Damages, Deficiencies table.
fields.reportLocation:
10.055: Unit Interior - Apparent Defects, Damages, Deficiencies - {No Label}
26.020: Reconciliation - Apparent Defects, Damages, Deficiencies - {No Label}

complianceRules.msg: Indicate whether the living unit has any defects, damages, or deficiencies.
complianceRules.logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitInteriorDefectsExistIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

complianceRules.msg: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency in the interior of the living unit or the ADU. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking DEFECT to the PROPERTY_UNIT that has the defect. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
complianceRules.logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and UnitInteriorDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_PROPERTY_UNIT" linking DEFECT to the given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT

A ceiling that features exposed joists and/or beams.
A ceiling that features two equally sloping sides that meet in the middle and often conforms to the shape of the roof.
A ceiling that features a series of rectangular, square or octagonal grids with sunken or recessed panels.
A secondary ceiling hung below the main ceiling or joists.
A ceiling with no pitch or change in height.
An inverted or recessed ceiling that features a center section that is several inches higher than the rest of the ceiling.
A ceiling that features higher than typical open areas with sloping sides that does not conform to the shape of the roof.

fields.name: AmenityType

enums.definition: Typically, a single runway with very basic or no aircraft support facilities which is designed for the take-off and landing of smaller personal aircraft.
A strip of land separating a body of water from inland areas, typically used for recreation or leisure purposes.
A form of access point, leading to a body of water, for boats or other watercraft.
A docking point for boats or other watercraft.
Upkeep and/or repair for all dwellings and structures (e.g. roof, siding, windows, doors, interior common areas).
A self-contained and manufactured area built into a structure and designed to be filled with water designated for swimming and other aquatic uses.
A room or location providing office facilities and services.
Service offered to provide support and assistance to individuals in performing tasks of personal or household care.
A building or area used for social or recreational activities by occupants of the project.
A membership that is defined within the deed and conveyed as part of the real estate (e.g. golf club, fitness club).
A private pier owned or controlled by the project which gives members access to the waterfront.
Assistance with organizing a variety of personal services.
Indicates that cooling is provided in common and included in the mandatory fees.
A platform which is located next to or attached to the structure and is accessible from the dwelling.
An individual providing courtesy and/or security services in a residential building.
A system designed to provide on demand charging for compatible electric vehicles.
A mechanized platform used for raising and lowering people or things from one level to another.
A room, area or structure specifically designed for exercise or other physical wellness activities.
A community which controls access either through an automated gate or staffed security point.
Upkeep and/or repair of all outdoor areas not associated with a structure or dwelling (e.g. lawn mowing, landscaping, fencing, gates, irrigation systems, exterior amenities).
Indicates that heating is provided in common and included in the mandatory fees.
A self-contained and manufactured area built into the ground and designed to be filled with water, designated for swimming and other aquatic uses.
A tub type structure built into the ground which typically contains hot aerated water used for recreational and wellness activities.
A common room near the main entrance of a building.
Cleaning services offered for the upkeep of the unit.
An area open to the elements, typically surrounded with fencing, which is specifically designed for horse riding.
An area open to the elements designed to be used for personal cleaning through the use of flowing water and appropriate drainage.
A solid surface outdoor area located on the site.
A room or area designated to be used for recreation and entertainment.
A service offered to short term renters to facilitate their entry into the property.
A room that is designed to be heated to high temperatures, typically with steam.
An area of a structure containing washing machines and/or dryers which are designated for the cleaning and care of clothing and linens.
Service offered to owners to market and rent their units on a short term basis.
An area, either open or covered, specifically designed for multiple recreational and athletic activities.
Access to television and/or internet services (e.g. cable, satellite).
A room or area within a project, outside of the unit designed to secure personal belongings.
Access rights for project residents and their guests to waterways or bodies of water.
The space or land within the project that is adjacent to or facing a body of water.
A structure or barrier designed to enclose an area of the site.
A water system designed to hydrate the lawn and/or other outdoor plants.
A self-contained location outside of a structure which is used to accommodate a fire.
A permanent outdoor area designed and equipped to be used for the preparation and cooking of food.
An elevated, often covered, platform surrounded by walls and/or railing systems projecting from the outside of the building with access from within the structure.
A roofed structure which is typically open on all sides.
A covered area surrounded by walls and/or railings projecting from the structure with roof lines attached to or similar to the structure.
A structural element leading to the entrance of a structure with a roof supported by columns or enclosed walls.
A system designed to extinguish fires.
A self-contained unit or framed opening located inside of a structure which is used for containing fire.
A system which allows independent control of the temperature for various areas of the dwelling.
A system which allows control of household systems through the use of a remote device.
A system designed to provide continuous exchange of air within the dwelling (e.g. air exchanger).
A heating mechanism fueled by wood.
